scripts.build: npm run build -w @auto-page-agent/shared && npm run build -w @auto-page-agent/bridge && npm run build -w @auto-page-agent/extension
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @auto-page-agent/shared && npm run typecheck -w @auto-page-agent/bridge && npm run typecheck -w @auto-page-agent/extension
scripts.test: npm run test -w @auto-page-agent/bridge && npm run test -w @auto-page-agent/extension
